title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: - **CI inspection loophole**: prompts say “Do not inspect CI unless explicitly asked later,” which can be read as permission to stop at local validation even for “fix production and verify it works.” Needed wording: **“If the user asks for production verification, CI/workflow inspection is mandatory and overrides the default no-CI rule.”** [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L8) [k.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/k.md#L10) [vote.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L10) [v.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/v.md#L10) - **Smoke-mode early-exit loophole**: smoke mode explicitly says stop after marker lines; that can legally end work before real runtime verification if marker is present. Needed wording: **“Smoke-mode stop is allowed only for prompt self-tests; never for user tasks that request implementation or production verification.”** [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L25) [vote.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L23) - **Dispatch-only false completion**: prompts allow backup dispatch, but do not require waiting for run outcome/artifact evidence; agent can stop after queueing. Needed wording: **“For production verification, dispatch-only is insufficient; completion requires at least one completed run and cited pass/fail evidence from the target steps/artifacts.”** [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L8) [vote.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L10) - **Stale fail-closed policy can justify premature `BLOCKED`**: `/vote` auto-implement is declared “currently fail-closed,” which can permit stopping even when latest workflows may be fixed. Needed wording: **“This fail-closed rule applies only when current-run readiness checks fail; otherwise continue through implementation + runtime verification.”** [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md#L98) - **No explicit completion proof for production tasks**: current completion language is broad (“task reaches real completion”), so agent can claim done after code/test without production path proof. Needed wording: **“If task includes ‘production’ or ‘verify works’, completion requires runtime proof (run id, workflow sha, decisive step result), or explicit external blocker evidence.”** [vote.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L27) [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L35)
